name: RealityBridge: Bridging Editable 3D Gaussian Splatting Driving Simulations and Real-World Videos
summary: arXiv:2606.16278v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Long-tail hazardous scenarios are essential for safety-oriented autonomous driving, yet they are difficult to collect and reproduce at scal...
description: arXiv:2606.16278v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Long-tail hazardous scenarios are essential for safety-oriented autonomous driving, yet they are difficult to collect and reproduce at scale. Editable 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) simulation offers a promising alternative by reconstructing real driving scenes and supporting controllable scene editing. However, edited 3DGS-rendered videos...
author: Zhenhua Wu, Yun Pang, Mingkun Chang, Yuwei Ning, Liangzhi Wang, Yi Xiao, Guanbin Li
